Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
dialogs_human_settlement_Тот, что выдают: The one they issue at the administration.
dialogs_human_settlement_Да нет, его выд: Oh no, they issue these to everyone. Just a mere formality.
dialogs_human_settlement_Так может вы то: Maybe you'll let me in then?
dialogs_human_settlement_Как мы тебя пус: How can we let you in if you have no pass?
dialogs_human_settlement_Но это же пуста: But it's just a mere formality!
dialogs_human_settlement_Пустая не пуста: Formality or not, that's the law.
dialogs_human_settlement_Вход в админист: The administration entrance is over there.
dialogs_human_settlement_Астрид сегодня: Astrid has no appointments for today.
dialogs_human_settlement_Привет! Я в это:
Hello! I don't know a thing about this.
Would you like, eh... a coffee?
dialogs_human_settlement_Ох, какой же я: Oh, I'm such a goof ball!
dialogs_human_settlement_Я кажется опять: Seems like I dropped mu auto-pen again.
dialogs_human_settlement_Оу! Ничего, я п: Oh! That's okay, I'll get it.
dialogs_human_settlement_Длинноногая сек:
A long-legged secretary in a short dress
bent down deeply and picked up an auto-pen.
dialogs_human_settlement_*шепотом* Мой б: *whispering* My boss is so-o clever! Are you?
dialogs_human_settlement_Джули, я же зап: Julie, I told you not to chit-chat at the workplace!
dialogs_human_settlement_Эм... Вам нужно: Er... You need a referral to the healer, correct?
dialogs_human_settlement_Нет, я... как ж: No, I... boy, how do I say it! I came here from the big land!
dialogs_human_settlement_Ну да. Про вас: Why, yes. They did tell me about you.
dialogs_human_settlement_Точно! Рабочий: Right! The worker at the bridge promised to report on me!
dialogs_human_settlement_Угу. Я сейчас в: Yup. I will write you the note, just a moment.
dialogs_human_settlement_К лекарю, конеч: Referral for healer treatment, of course.
dialogs_human_settlement_Мы же уже выясн:
We did learn that you're the fisherman that's gone mad, 
as I've been told already.
dialogs_human_settlement_Я не рыбак, дья:
I am no fisher, for heaven's sake, I am a sailor! 
Our ship entered this fog, and then I barely made it alive...
dialogs_human_settlement_Да-да, я знаю,: Yeah-yeah, I know how it is. You think it's the first time?
dialogs_human_settlement_Ну конечно! Рыб:
Why, of course! Going way too far from the shore, the 
fishermen fall under the influence of the fog and go 
insane...
dialogs_human_settlement_Какие только бр: What nonsense stories they make up!
dialogs_human_settlement_И ведь каждый г:
Yet they come with the directions every year, they put the 
signs - all in vain! You fishermen are way too risky.
You really should watch out for yourself!
dialogs_human_settlement_Потом детей не:
And then they won't recognize their wives and children... 
Luckily, we have good healthcare!
dialogs_human_settlement_Бюрократ положи:
The bureaucrat lays before you a paper he'd been writing on this 
whole time.
dialogs_human_settlement_И что мне с эти: What do I do with this?
dialogs_human_settlement_Что делать с на:
With the referral? 
Julie, what do they do with the referral?
dialogs_human_settlement_Правильно. Наш:
That's right. Our healer will knock some sense into you in 
a few visits.
dialogs_human_settlement_Джули, проверь,: Julie, would you please check if she sees anyone today.
dialogs_human_settlement_Лекарь. Ну Астр: The healer. It's Astrid, you know her!
dialogs_human_settlement_Я не сумасшедши:
I'm not a madman, I have some important information for you,
your fog is fading away, so you can finally reunite with the rest of 
the world!
dialogs_human_settlement_Тебе нужно доло: You have to report it to someone!
Listen, er... do you recall your name?
dialogs_human_settlement_Эйрик! Это не м:
Eirik! That is neither my field of expertize nor my agenda, 
so I am not going to prove anything to you.
dialogs_human_settlement_Я выписываю нап:
I'm writing out the referrals. That's it! 
If you are not insane, you go prove it to the healer.
dialogs_human_settlement_Тихо-тихо, Эйри:
Hush now, Eirik. I see that you're a nice guy. 
I'm just telling you it is not up to me to decide whether 
you're legally capable.
dialogs_human_settlement_Обсуди свою бол: You should discuss this continent of yours with Astrid!
dialogs_human_settlement_Ох, беда. Ну, з:
Oh, pity. Well, this means you'll have to come back later.
She'll be there for appointments tomorrow.
dialogs_human_settlement_Бюрократ всучил:
The bureaucrat handed you the referral note and came
back to his business.
dialogs_human_settlement_(Так теперь все: (So now they think I'm nuts?! Damn it!)
dialogs_human_settlement_Ох, Астрид! А я: Oh, Astrid! I've been looking for you.
Yes, I know. This guy's hot, right?
dialogs_human_settlement_Угу. Думаешь, о: Uh-huh. You think he's clever? I like the clever ones.
dialogs_human_settlement_Он милашка. Нав:
He's a cutie. I bet he's all bold and assertive... 
a beefcake in the most colorful package!
dialogs_human_settlement_(И такой беспом:
(And so innocent... 
Maybe this time I'll get to have some fun for a change?)
dialogs_human_settlement_Получено направ: Received a referral to the outpost's staff healer!
dialogs_human_settlement_Ваш случай и пр: Your case seems to be quite an outstanding one.
dialogs_human_settlement_У нас нет инстр: I don't have any directions for this, can you imagine?!
dialogs_human_settlement_Отличный повод: A great opportunity to shine, isn't it?
dialogs_human_settlement_Что? Нет-нет-не:
What? No-no-no! Not a chance! I cannot bear this
responsibility!
dialogs_human_settlement_Я отправил в ст:
I sent a dispatch to the capital. They will probably assemble 
an emergency board and send it here as soon as possible.
dialogs_human_settlement_Предполагаю, он: They will hold an investigation, I suppose.
dialogs_human_settlement_В любом случае,:
Anyway, this is not my duty, mister Eirik. 
As I said, I did all that I could.
dialogs_human_settlement_(Теперь меня хо:
(At least they would listen to me now. 
Who knew, Astrid didn't lie!)
dialogs_human_settlement_(\"Дополнительн: ("An extra visit", huh, so she really is into me.)
dialogs_human_settlement_(Для меня это п:
(It's my last chance to sneak to the transmutator at ease, 
there is no wait.)
dialogs_human_settlement_(Нужно сказать: (I should tell Merigold to prepare her flasks.)
dialogs_human_settlement_Стой, с тобой ж: Wait, you're good for now, no?
dialogs_human_settlement_Последние тесты: The last tests. Astrid should be waiting for me now.
dialogs_human_settlement_Ах, да. Она гов: Ah, yes. She told me you may come. Alright, move it.
dialogs_human_settlement_Как мне попасть: How do I get to the healer?
dialogs_human_settlement_Там у двери сто: There's a guard at the door. He'll escort you out.
dialogs_human_settlement_Тут с меня стра: There's a guard by the door. He'll walk you there.
dialogs_human_settlement_Конечно требуют:
Of course they do. That's the borderline, and strict rules 
are normal here.
dialogs_human_settlement_Они сказали, чт: They said that the pass ticket is easy-peasy to get.
dialogs_human_settlement_Верно. Пропуск:
Correct. The pass is issued under the simplified procedure.
It is all well set, the least bureaucracy one may face.
dialogs_human_settlement_Нет! Я не могу:
No! I can't give you the pass ticket until your real name 
and citizenship are made known.
dialogs_human_settlement_Это не важно! В: Doesn't matter! What matters is in the papers.
dialogs_human_settlement_А если у меня н: But what if I have no papers?
dialogs_human_settlement_А это уже не мо:
This is none of my business. You show me the documents, and
I give you the ticket. That is how it works.
dialogs_human_settlement_Послушайте, Эйр: Listen, Eirik, this is a very simple procedure!
dialogs_human_settlement_Направляете по:
You send a letter of pleading at your place of residence. 
If you are considered a missing person there, 
they send the answer:
dialogs_human_settlement_\"Да, был у нас:
"Yes, we did have an Eirik, born this day of this year. 
Now he's missing."
dialogs_human_settlement_На основании эт:
Based on this sealed letter, I issue you the pass ticket 
and you can go home.
dialogs_human_settlement_Если вы вышлите:
If you send a special delivery, it should take less than a 
week!
dialogs_human_settlement_А если я не чис: And what if I'm not on the missing list anywhere on the island?
dialogs_human_settlement_Ты опять про эт:
This again?! I have no time for this nonsense! In these 
times of great progress, amnesia and psychosis are 
a piece of cake!
dialogs_human_settlement_Все, Мистер Эйр:
That's enough, Mr Eirik! I have prescribed you a referral 
for treatment. I told you what to do. This is where duty 
ends.
dialogs_human_settlement_Уходите и не ме: Now leave and let me work!
dialogs_human_settlement_(Отлично! Выход: (Great! Now I'm stuck at the border... Dang it!)
dialogs_human_settlement_Продолжение кве: The quest to be continued in the next add-on.
dialogs_human_settlement_Отдел снабжения:
Supply and logistics department of the southern border outpost.
Trading with private individuals is permitted by general's special
decree...
dialogs_human_settlement_...в связи с па: ...in connection with the paragraph on the border areas support...
dialogs_human_settlement_...по постановл: ...by government decree of the 10th day of...
dialogs_human_settlement_Да, я понял, то: Yes, got it, trading is allowed!
dialogs_human_settlement_Новый интендант:
The new quartermaster will take office shortly.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused.
dialogs_human_settlement_Начальство поса:
The head office has put in charge of the administration 
here some glossy dirtbag from the Capital. He's not only 
a civilian, but also a fool!
dialogs_human_settlement_Притащил сюда ж:
He dragged his wife and son here, and now he canoodles 
with his secretary. What's is wrong with that man's head?!
dialogs_human_settlement_Всегда заказыва:
We ordered firewood from the sawmill already chopped, but 
the new chief introduced an "economy policy", dang it!
dialogs_human_settlement_Вот пусть сам т: Let him chop it himself then, right?!
dialogs_human_settlement_Отстой! Это мес:
This sucks! This place really sucks! Why couldn't dad find
some normal job in the Capital?
dialogs_human_settlement_Это просто дыра:
This some crap hole of a place! Who do I hang out with now, 
huh?
dialogs_human_settlement_Питер, ты идешь: Peter, are you coming? I need your help with the laundry!
dialogs_human_settlement_Мой муж теперь:
My husband is now the head of the outpost, when in the 
Capital he tossed papers for a wage! Of course I'm glad 
we moved!
dialogs_human_settlement_А цены? Вы знае:
And the prices! Do you know how high they are in the 
Capital? Here we can at last save up for our son to have
an education!
dialogs_human_settlement_Питер, подойди: Peter, come here, help with the laundry!
dialogs_human_settlement_Да-да, мам, уже: Yeah, mom, I'm on my way!
dialogs_human_settlement_Парень, хочешь: Do you want an apple, boy?
Бюрократ_Господин Эйрик, вы что-то хотел: Mister Eirik, did you need something?
Винкинс_Он у врача. Что-то он там засиде: He is at the doctor's. He has been in there for a while.
Эйрик (задумчивость)_(Оставили парня нае:
(They left the guy alone with Astrid... 
Maybe I should check on him?)
Винкинс_Господин советник должен быть у: Mister Advisor should be at the local doctor, Astrid.
Бюрократ_Она отправилась за какими-то ма: She went to the intendant's for some materials.
Сейчас это невозможно. Займитесь другими:
That’s not possible right now. Focus on other matters and
progress through the story. Will you return to the doctor
later?
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Так что это за остр:
So what kind of island is this? Can you tell me a bit
about it?
Бюрократ_За главными воротами начинается:
The island is divided in half by a river. Humans live on
the western shore, while beastfolk have settled east of
the river.
Бюрократ_Она доходит до Cтолицы. Столица:
Right now, we’re at a border outpost called the Southern
Gate.
Бюрократ_Есть деревеньки и форты, но в о:
The river narrows in the south, making it crossable, and
we make sure the beastfolk don’t come across to the
western side.
Бюрократ_Ах, ну и конечно, я сейчас гово: So they don’t infiltrate the civilized world.
Бюрократ_Не ходи туда ни в коем случае!:
Beyond the gates of our outpost lies the road north,
straight to the Capital.
Бюрократ_На севере есть еще какие-то, по:
There are some villages and forts up north, but they’re
all small. The Capital is essentially the only major city
on the Island.
Бюрократ_И да, скажу еще раз - здесь, юж:
And yes, let me say it again — this is border territory
south of the gates. It’s dangerous here!
Бюрократ_Я бы очень не советовал тебе хо:
I strongly advise you not to go beyond the local farm.
Don’t cross the river! The beastfolk show no mercy!
